since_last: 46% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.79%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.09% · BTC -0.78% · Gold +2.29% · Nasdaq100 -0.07%. 46% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.79%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.79%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +23.73%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +23.73%, DELL +9.10%, CBRS +5.17%, AVAV +5.13%, HPE +5.10%. Laggards: PATH -11.89%, GEV -5.97%, NOW -4.84%, PLTR -4.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.68% at $124.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
